CustomField.description: This field is updated when a change to a formula field i detected. Formula field changes doesn't trigger a resync to MC. This timetsamp-field will cause a resave of Account record, therefore a resync with MC occurs. Don't use for other purposes. [Sep 2024] Currently tracking formula updates on MembershipCategory__c, MembershipStatus__c and MemberPhase__c
CustomField.label: MC Formulas Timestamp
